IconGrid.description: Keyline grid used to align icon shapes.

base_size_px.description: Base grid size in pixels (e.g. 24 for a 24×24 canvas).

padding_px.description: Padding (safe area) from the edge of the canvas, in pixels.

IconVariant.description: A single icon variant in the system (e.g. "regular-outlined-24px").

corner_radius_px.description: Corner radius in pixels (applies to rounded / sharp distinctions).

stroke_width_px.description:
Stroke width in pixels at the base grid size (optional — filled variants
may omit).

use_cases.description:
Surfaces where this variant is used (navigation, list rows, empty
states, etc.).

PathRef.description:
Path-based cross-reference relative to .corpospec/ root.
Pattern: `^[a-z0-9_-]+(/[a-z0-9_.-]+)+$`

description:
Brand iconography system. Captures the systematic rules behind every icon
the brand ships — weights, styles, grids, and production sources —
independent of the individual assets enumerated in `AssetCatalog`.

anti_patterns.description:
Anti-patterns — how icons must NOT be used (e.g. "never rotate",
"never apply drop shadows").

color_usage.description:
Conventions for applying colour to icons (fill rules, duotone pairs,
semantic-colour binding).

grid.description: The grid that icon shapes align to.

name.description:
Display name of the icon system (e.g. `"Unstarter Duotone"`,
`"KICKGEIST Sport"`).

source_files.description:
PathRefs to production source files (SVG sets, Figma components,
font-icon glyph maps).

variants.description: Variants (weights × styles × sizes) shipped by this system.

title: IconographySystem
